name: Saurabh Wagaj
quote: Mission Admission's guidance was the game-changer for me. The CAP round strategy was spot-on — I got exactly the college and branch I wanted without any stress.

name: Shreya Varne
quote: I was confused between accepting MANIT or waiting for Maharashtra CAP. The personalized advice I got from Mission Admission helped me make the right call — and I'm loving it here.

name: Hemangi Koli
quote: Prashant Sir's cutoff analysis was incredibly accurate. He told me exactly which option to fill first and I got PICT CS in Round 1 itself. Couldn't be happier!

name: Janhavi Shaha
quote: As a girl student, I wanted a safe campus with strong placements. Mission Admission helped me understand why Cummins was the perfect fit for me. Best decision ever.

name: Rahul Patil
quote: The option form strategy worked perfectly. I upgraded from my initial allotment to VJTI in Round 2 exactly as predicted. Mission Admission knows the CAP round system inside out.

name: Priya Deshmukh
quote: Navigating NEET counselling for state quota vs All India quota is really confusing. Mission Admission simplified the entire process and I got my dream medical college.

name: Aditya Kulkarni
quote: I almost gave up on NIT after seeing my percentile. Mission Admission showed me NIT Surathkal civil was within reach and guided me through JoSAA counselling. Life-changing advice!

name: Sneha Joshi
quote: I had a good MHT-CET score but was unsure about private vs government colleges. Mission Admission's fee-vs-placement analysis helped me choose SIT confidently.
